source_jobs.title: Energy Efficiency Lighting Trade Ally Account Manager (Remote - CT)
source_jobs.description:
<div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 14pt;">Interested in joining a growing company where you will work with talented colleagues, enhance a supportive and energetic culture, and be part of the climate solution? At Energy Solutions, we focus on the big impacts. And we believe that market-based programs can be a powerful force to deliver large-scale energy, carbon, and water-use savings. Since 1995, we’ve harnessed that power to offer proven, performance-based solutions for our utility, government, and institutional customers.</span></p></div><p><span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 14pt;"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">Energy Solutions is looking for&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">an</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;</span></span><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">Energy Efficiency Lighting</span></span></strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;</span></span><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">Trade Ally Manager II</span></span></strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">to&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">deliver</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;energy efficiency program performance&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">through targeted market engagement and outreach</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;in&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">Connecticut.</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;This role&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">coordinates</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;with manufacturers, distributors, contractors, and internal teams to support participation in midstream&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">lighting&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">and market-facing programs</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">.&nbsp;</span></span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:false,&quot;134233118&quot;:false,&quot;134245417&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:2,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559685&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:240,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></span></p>
<p><span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 14pt;"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">The Energy Efficiency Lighting&nbsp;Trade Ally Manager II </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">evaluates</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;market feedback and participation data to prioritize outreach, ensure consistent program execution, and address participation barriers.
